statement: In every magma, Equation 4219 (`x * y = ((z * y) * z) * w`) implies Equation 3771 (`x * y = (y * z) * (x * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0433
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z y) z) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op y z) (op x w))
